brief_summary_anonymized: Beverage major — Ramadan packaging launch. Risk: blend into Ramadan-ad cliché.
strategic_insight: Don't avoid the Ramadan-ad cliché — embrace it as a commentary. The campaign performs the genre while subverting it.
execution_summary: Visually + tonally mimics Ramadan-ad sub-genre. Audience recognizes the format. Subtle pivot reveals the campaign is aware of what it's doing. Self-aware genre play.
what_made_it_work: Self-aware genre-play signals confidence and earns audience smile
Cultural commentary outperforms straight commercial content
Targets audience that's saturated with sector clichés
what_would_NOT_transplant: Requires audience saturated with the genre being parodied
Easy to misread as disrespectful; restraint critical for religious-occasion content
